query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A silhouetted figure with outstretched arms is positioned against a pale, curved horizontal structure in a predominantly black environment. Bright, irregular highlights appear in the upper left corner and along scattered edges of the frame, while the surrounding setting remains obscured and difficult to discern.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavy film grain and extreme underexposure dominate this high-contrast black and white photograph, rendering a silhouetted figure with outstretched arms against a pale curved structure as a near-abstract composition where surfaces, features, and background details dissolve into crushed shadows and textured darkness. The image abandons representational clarity in favor of gesture and tonal extremes, creating an oppressive, unsettling atmosphere that evokes dread through its suffocating lack of visible detail.
